clients.name: Analytics Service (service account)
clients.description: Service account for analytics — collects metrics from OpenMRS and OpenELIS

clients.name: HL7 Service (service account)
clients.description: Service account for hl7 MLLP gateway — writes ADT/ORU events to OpenMRS

clients.name: Integration Hub (service account)
clients.description: Service account for integration-hub — syncs patients and orders between OpenMRS, OpenELIS, and Odoo

clients.name: Odoo ERP (OAuth2 SSO)
clients.description: Confidential OIDC client for Odoo 17 auth_oauth module — server-side code exchange

clients.name: OpenELIS (OIDC)
clients.description: Confidential OIDC client for OpenELIS Global 2 SSO

clients.name: Admin Dashboard SPA
clients.description: Public OIDC client for the Admin Dashboard browser SPA — PKCE-only, no client secret

clients.name: OpenHIS Platform Services
clients.description: Confidential OIDC client for backend service accounts (admin, integration-hub, etc.)

clients.name: OpenHIS Portal (SPA)
clients.description: Public OIDC client for the browser portal — no secret, uses PKCE

clients.name: Patient Portal (service account)
clients.description: Service account for Patient Portal — backend FHIR calls to OpenMRS/OpenELIS

clients.name: RIS Service (service account)
clients.description: Service account for RIS — polls OpenMRS for imaging orders

clientScopes.name: web-origins
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add allowed web origins to the access token

clientScopes.name: roles
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add user roles to the access token

clientScopes.name: acr
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add acr (authentication context class reference) to the token

Flow to determine if the OTP is required for the authentication
Handle what to do if there is existing account with same email/username like authenticated identity provider
Flow to determine if the OTP should be reset or not. Set to REQUIRED to force.
Flow for the existing/non-existing user alternatives
Used by Docker clients to authenticate against the IDP
Actions taken after first broker login with identity provider account, which is not yet linked to any Keycloak account
Username, password, otp and other auth forms.
Reset credentials for a user if they forgot their password or something
